auth.portal_desc: Sign in to manage your activities

common.logout_desc: Confirm the decoupling of your current credentials from the spatial registry portal.

technician.portal_desc: View your assigned maintenance tasks and submit reports.
technician.no_active: You have no active assignments right now.
technician.submit_desc: Mark task "{{description}}" as complete for Review.
technician.notes_placeholder: Describe what was fixed or replaced...

student.portal_desc: Overview of your maintenance requests and structural feedback across the campus perimeter.
student.zero_desc: Your reported anomalies will materialize here.

manager.analytics_desc: Analyze technical performance matrices and manage specialized personnel across the organizational grid.

facility.explorer_desc: Navigate the institutional perimeter to identify and report structural anomalies.
facility.no_rooms: No room modules detected in this level.

safety.title: Global Safety Protocol
safety.desc: In case of critical structural failure or life-threatening environmental hazards, please contact the spatial emergency line immediately.

landing.title: SSKRU Maintenance Management
landing.desc: A unified platform for reporting repairs, tracking task status, and managing institutional resources with maximum efficiency.
landing.feature_1_desc: File repair requests instantly with photo evidence for faster institutional response.
landing.feature_2_desc: Monitor maintenance progress in real-time and get notified upon task completion.
landing.feature_3_desc: Every modification and repair is systematically archived to ensure complete transparency.
landing.inspiration_note: This system was developed by 1st-year Software Engineering and AI students as an innovative solution for university resource management:
landing.all_rights: SSKRU Institutional Report System © All Rights Reserved
